title: Polynomial Freiman-Ruzsa, Reed-Muller codes and Shannon capacity

thm:9.summary: RM codes have vanishing local error below capacity — establishes polarization theory for RM codes.

thm:14.title: Entropic Freiman-Ruzsa Theorem (GGMT)
thm:14.summary: Cites GGMT entropic PFR as key ingredient.

cor:15.title: Conditional Entropic Freiman-Ruzsa Theorem
cor:15.summary: Conditional version of entropic PFR used in the proof.

lem:21.summary: Small orbit localization lemma — novel contribution with broader applicability.

cor:24.summary: Corollary for subspace distance from orbit localization.

conjecture:45.summary: New additive combinatorics conjecture with broader coding theory applications.

edges.note: The cited GGMT entropic PFR theorem yields the conditional version.
The small-orbit-localization lemma uses the conditional entropic PFR corollary.
Orbit localization yields the subspace-distance corollary.
The recurrent-layer entropy inequality uses the subspace-distance bounds.
The polarization bound establishes the Reed-Muller capacity result.
The strong-capacity theorem extends the main capacity result.
